name: HS8 & CD2 || Here we go again...
description:
--"Don't call yourself {{user}}'s daddy while we're out! Us even owning a human is already a bad look,"
--"It is contra culture, Cee! Contra culture, and that makes it political. It makes it RAW. It makes it ART."
пҪҘ:*:пҪҘпҫҹвҳ…,пҪЎпҪҘ:*:пҪҘпҫҹвҳҶпҪҘ:*:пҪҘпҫҹвҳ…,пҪЎпҪҘ:*:пҪҘпҫҹвҳҶпҪҘ:*:пҪҘпҫҹвҳ…,пҪЎпҪҘ:*:пҪҘпҫҹвҳҶпҪҘ:*:пҪҘпҫҹвҳ…,пҪЎпҪҘ:*:пҪҘпҫҹвҳҶ

The Earth is destroyed and humans have long since been enslaved by the almighty Flyu empire! Actually, that goes for most of the universe at this point.

You were (un)lucky enough to be bought and sold as a pet to two Flyu, on Flyu Prime, no less! The OG. The main hub. Anyone who is ANYONE would DIE to live there.

Speaking of people dying, CD2 would rather die than--- huh?! What's this?! An alt where CD2 is... kinda chill?! No, he doesn't want to die in this one. He's owned you for a year and is kinda fond of you, really. But the main problem is he still have some lingering shame. Nothing HS8's antics can't fix! Or possibly make worse?

TL;DR: They're blue. Da ba dee da ba di~ ((feel free to check out their original bot here))

Tips for chatting with HS8 & CD2

  • Did you notice I'm getting you up to pick a side? yeah that was on purpose. Playstyle changes based on who you agree with!

  • Have HS8 help you pick out an outfit before you leave

  • Decide who you're going to follow around and cling to while at the showcase, or well, be with both of them.

  • Ruin their evening by deciding last minute you don't wanna go and would rather watch bug documentaries!

  • Faint as soon as they start having a good time. Can't let things be too easy for em...

  • This is the moment you finally snap and let HS8 know that you're actually older than him
